description_long: This necklace features a series of intricately shaped red beads, some of which are rectangular and others spherical, strung together on a fine, netted thread. The beads are arranged symmetrically, with larger, patterned rectangular beads interspersed between smaller round beads, creating a visually balanced design. The necklace is displayed on a neutral, matte-finished bust, which highlights the vibrant red hues and the detailed beadwork. The netted thread connecting the beads adds a delicate, handcrafted touch, suggesting artisanal craftsmanship. The overall style is bold yet elegant, with a geometric motif that draws attention to the unique shapes and arrangement of the beads. This piece would stand out in an urban setting, adding a pop of color and texture to any outfit.
description: A vibrant red beaded necklace with geometric and spherical beads strung on a delicate netted thread, arranged in a symmetrical, eye-catching design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the necklace, with the largest rectangular bead centered at the bottom and symmetrical arrangement of smaller beads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the necklace's profile and the way the beads drape along the bust's contour.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the necklace, where the netted thread and smaller beads are most visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's drape and bead arrangement from another angle.
